plot outline: A talented American graduate of Oxford, using his unique skills, and audacity, creates a marijuana empire using the estates of impoverished British aristocrats. However, when he tries to sell his empire to a fellow American billionaire, a chain of events unfolds, involving blackmail, deception, mayhem and murder between street thugs, Russian oligarchs, Triad gangsters and gutter journalists.
title: The Gentlemen
akas: The Gentlemen: Los señores de la mafia (Spain)

other companies.name: Above the Line Set Assistance & Security
